cards.front: What is the purpose of MediaStore in Android?
cards.back: The MediaStore is a content provider that stores audio and video data in Android.

cards.front: Which class is used to play audio and video in Android?
cards.back: The MediaPlayer class is used to play audio and video in Android.

cards.front: What is the TextToSpeech class used for?
cards.back: The TextToSpeech class is used to convert text into speech in Android.

cards.front: Which intent is used to play audio and video?
cards.back: The 'android.intent.action.VIEW' intent is used to play audio and video.

cards.front: What is the MediaSession class used for?
cards.back: The MediaSession class is used to control audio playback in Android.
